articles.title: Player grades: Ingram loses goalie duel to Forsberg, Oilers beaten 1-0 by Kings
articles.description: Los Angeles Kings goalie Anton Forsberg out-battled Edmonton Oilers goalie Connor Ingram, as the King won 1-0 in a boring, but hard fought game that picked up some steam as it went along. The Grade A shots were 18 to 9 for the Edmonton, with the subset of most dangerous 5-alarm shots to seven each.
